resources.string: KeiOS generates an editable Issue Markdown draft locally. You choose browser prefill or GitHub API submission.
Draft generated. Add reproduction steps before submitting.
These fields are added to the draft to identify the build and system environment.
Reads KeiOS AppLogger file logs only. Export the ZIP and attach it on GitHub yourself.
Edit title and body before submitting. The log summary is basically redacted.
Browser flow finishes on GitHub. API flow uses the token saved on the GitHub page.
Open the GitHub bug report form with title and body prefilled.
Token configured; target repository Issues write permission is required.
Token missing; browser prefill remains available.
GitHub Issue form will open. Final submission happens in the browser.
GitHub API will create a public Issue. Add the log ZIP attachment from the web page afterward.
GitHub token is missing or lacks Issues write permission. Browser prefill is recommended.
Issue content is public on the GitHub repository.
Review body, screenshots, recordings, and ZIP for tokens and private information.
Add reproduction steps, expected behavior, and actual behavior.
Drag the log ZIP into GitHub attachment area manually.
Title and body are required before submission.
GitHub token is missing; fine-grained tokens need Issues write permission for hosizoraru/KeiOS.
